label: Realism calibration — displace mirror, brightness balance, caustic 4x scale, bloom 14px
notes: comp_depth/ramp_depth operators kept disappearing on project reload — removed from chain permanently. null_underwater_out wires directly from comp_caustic. displace extend hold→mirror eliminated hard horizontal seam artifact. Sky brightness calibrated: cloud*0.90 + centerGlow exp(-r*1.9)*0.52. edgeFade smoothstep(0.82,1.42). caustic_scale 1.0→4.0 gives fine spiderweb pattern. ctrl_scene brightness 1.2→1.15.

operations.note: centerGlow exp(-r*1.9)*0.52, edgeFade smoothstep(0.82,1.42), cloud*0.90, rays*0.30
